text: "A fountain shall come forth of the house of the Lord."... The fountain of grace in the church militant, and of glory in the church triumphant: which shall water the torrent or valley of thorns, that is, the souls that before, like barren ground brought forth nothing but thorns; or that were afflicted with the thorns of crosses and tribulations.
"Judea"... —and Jerusalem. That is, the spiritual Jerusalem, viz., the church of Christ.
"Evil in a city."... He speaks of the evil of punishments of war, famine, pestilence, desolation, etc., but not of the evil of sin, of which God is not the author.
